<?php /** * League.Uri (https://uri.thephpleague.com) * * (c) Ignace Nyamagana Butera <nyamsprod@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Uri; enum SchemeType { case Opaque; case Hierarchical; case Unknown; public function isOpaque(): bool { return self::Opaque === $this; } public function isHierarchical(): bool { return self::Hierarchical === $this; } public function isUnknown(): bool { return self::Unknown === $this; } }
